title: About - Darren Paffey MP
meta_description: Your local voice for Southampton Itchen
text_excerpt: About - Darren Paffey MP Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate About My story My Missions for Southampton Itchen. My Campaigns Have your say on £20m funding for Weston Bring a Neighbourhood Health Centre to Bitterne Bring Back Local Banking! Step-Free Access at Woolston Train Station More Bobbies on the Beat End the Cladding & Leasehold Scandal Bathing Water Status for the River Itchen Latest News Parliamentary Activity Get in Touch Contact Me Invite Darren to Your Event Upcoming Events SEND Parent & Carer Coffee Morning Town Hall Q&A with Darren Paffey MP Advice Surgeries Pint with your MP Southampton Action Forums Newsletter Sign Up More Search Search the website Search Menu About I’m delighted to have been elected to parliament as the Labour MP for Southampton Itchen. The country has voted for change, and I am proud to be part of the government that will take the tough decisions that the last government dodged, in order to bring about the national renewal that we all know is needed. I got into politics to work together with communities to make Southampton a better place to be, and before I became an MP, I was a university lecturer and served as a city councillor since 2011. I’ve also served as the Cabinet Member for Children and Learning, and was Deputy Leader of Southampton City Council. My Story Darren Paffey "Breaking down barriers to opportunity for all and unlocking Southampton's true potential is my driving mission" - Darren Paffey MP for Southampton Itchen My Maiden Speech in Parliament Contact details Email: [email protected] Further details Promoted by Darren Paffey MP at PO Box 2002, Southampton, SO18 9TQ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
